title: One Island
description: Start alone on a small island in an endless ocean. Gather resources, build, explore, and survive with what the sea provides.
body:
One Island is a survival challenge where you begin on a single island surrounded by an infinite ocean.

You’ll have limited space and resources at first — just the island, the water, and your creativity. Explore the sea, gather materials, expand your base,...

A calm but challenging survival experience focused on exploration, resource management, and building your world from one small island. Perfect for solo or multiplayer adventures.
